headline: How is AI reshaping the world of work? You asked, we answered
summary: Chief data reporter John Burn-Murdoch and employment columnist Sarah O’Connor replied to readers
body_text:
Artificial intelligence is changing work faster than ever — boosting productivity, disrupting jobs and reshaping industries. What does it mean for your career and the wider economy?

The FT’s John Burn-Murdoch, chief data reporter, and Sarah O’Connor, employment columnist, responded to readers who were curious about how AI is reshaping the world of work.

The conversation coincided with the launch of The AI Shift, their new newsletter that combines data analysis and on-the-ground reporting to make sense of the transformations within industries and labour markets. Premium subscribers can sign up here. Or, if you’re a Standard subscriber, upgrade to Premium here.

Thank you to FT readers for taking part, and to John and Sarah for their thoughtful responses. You can read the full Q&A below.
